case_title: GUERRERO ESPINOZA VS. WILLIAM WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-20-2006 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
